non_overlap_requirement: Each source token must be assigned to exactly one active channel: morphology/history, observer/path, or clock/readout.
forbidden_inputs: rotation residual; best-fit family; baseline performance; duplicated Theta_morph/Xi_t token

non_overlap_requirement: Warp/vertical tokens may support mixed overlay, but cannot also support independent Xi_t unless a separate clock token is present.
forbidden_inputs: post-hoc RMSE improvement; curve-derived radial window

required_source_tokens: warp_phase; asymmetry_phase; companion_or_interaction_context; frozen radial calibration
non_overlap_requirement: History/asymmetry tokens support Theta_morph. They do not independently authorize clock/time projection.
Extra observer/path or Xi_t channels require new tokens beyond saturated projection evidence.
forbidden_inputs: visual edge-on label alone; post-hoc projection gain

non_overlap_requirement: Envelope/mass-closure evidence must be separated from clock/readout Xi_t and path/environment claims.
forbidden_inputs: velocity residual; residual-calibrated beta; Li2020 endpoint use if kept control-only

non_overlap_requirement: Clock evidence must not be the same warp/history/vertical token used by morphology/projection kernels.
forbidden_inputs: warp geometry reused from Theta_morph; visual improvement
